Onboarding flow
Made by Steyn Knollema
9:41
Meet Memo,
your home robot.
Takes care of the chores.
Gives you back your time.
Power on Memo
Press the button on Memo's base. It'll show up here automatically after a few seconds.
Use the real base button
Hold the top button for about 2 seconds until the lower light wakes up. Bluetooth search starts as soon as Memo is on.
Hold this top button
Light stays off
Turn Memo on first Press and hold the top button for about 2 seconds. The lower light should wake up, then Memo will appear below.
Looking for Memo nearby…
Make sure Memo is switched on
Searching
Memo #001 found
Ready to connect
Connected

Keep Memo within 2 metres while setting up. If the light stays off, hold the top button again.

Connect to Wi-Fi
Memo uses your home network to receive updates and run tasks. Choose your network below.
Your networks
Home_5G
Home_2.4G
Neighbour_WiFi
Password
Need a safe default? Start with your main home network. You can switch Wi-Fi later from the app if the signal is weak in some rooms.

Just a few quick things before I get started — helps me work safely around everyone at home.

Do you have pets?
Memo will move slower and be extra careful around them
Children under 5 at home?
Memo will stop immediately if a young child is nearby
Any rooms I should avoid?
Tap a room below to mark it as off-limits
